Good morning.
I hope you will get the help you clearly need.
We may share a surname, but make no mistake—we are no longer family.
"Loose lips sink ships." Remember that.
This is the last time you'll hear from me. I don't forgive, and I don't forget either.
Get yourself sorted out—Adieu.
